reasoning: Order #000000009 is marked as Complete, but payment method is Check/Money Order and Total Paid is $0.00, meaning no funds were received. A refund cannot be processed without a captured payment. Additionally, no shipment or tracking details are visible to confirm delivery. This discrepancy (Complete status + unpaid + customer claims non-receipt) requires escalation to investigate fulfillment records, shipment confirmation, and payment status before any refund decision can be made.
